not_print_ready_until: stratified double review reports reviewer agreement
full deterministic assembled export passes gates

modern_source_policy.policy: approved modern Sanskrit-Russian sources are publishable body text with attribution and provenance; do not downgrade them to evidence-only and do not strip them solely because they are modern

phases.title: Repair concrete audit defects before scale-up
deliverables: scale routing via the microstructure sense parser
exit_criteria: py_compile passes for src/*.py
pwg_mask stats round-trip audit is clean except quarantined legacy tail
_audit.py reports VERDICT: CLEAN
nws_split.py selftest passes
Agni/agni do not lemmatize to agnut
every PWG key maps to a unique filesystem-legal stem
normal assembled output has no lossless=false records

phases.title: Re-harvest and re-translate a small a-section slice
deliverables: review queue seeded from the regenerated slice
exit_criteria: sample cards use the shared filename mapping
sample cards carry provenance and review_status
approved modern-source text is retained with attribution
all severity >=3 cards are in the human review queue

phases.title: Promote the Apresjan portrait into the canonical card schema
deliverables: sense tree rather than flat sense bag
diasystem labels from PWG markers and source strata
exit_criteria: card schema can represent homographs without pooling
every sense has a parent/path or explicit root
equivalent glosses and explanatory glosses are separated
synonym candidates are converted into Apresjan-style differentiae

phases.title: Freeze a human-checked gold set and measure scientific reliability
deliverables: human labels for correct, lemma-variant, proper-name, partial, wrong-sense, hallucinated
exit_criteria: precision is reported with Wilson 95 percent confidence intervals
reviewer agreement is tracked on the double-reviewed sample
gold-set inputs and labels are immutable for the edition cut
machine-only estimates are clearly separated from human-reviewed estimates

phases.title: Make the edition citable, reproducible, and interoperable
deliverables: JSON Schema for assembled and final cards
exit_criteria: all release artifacts validate against committed schemas
edition cut records source commits, prompts, model IDs, and build commands
TEI/OntoLex exports round-trip key and sense identifiers
reverse index links Russian lemmas back to Sanskrit headwords and senses

evidence: corpus_harvest.py agni emits agni/name rather than agnut
real Russian verbs such as idi, dai, nesi still lemmatize as verbs
full assemble.py build 1500 needs a longer supervised run
0 are print-ready because legacy rows are legacy_needs_review
existing precision report is LLM-judged scaffold only
gold/HUMAN_GOLD_PROTOCOL.md defines labels, workflow, adjudication, and acceptance criteria
python src/gold_review_csv.py exports 320 balanced rows for human review
human-checked final labels still required before precision claims
stratified double-reviewed sample and agreement report still required
python src/validate_portrait_schema.py validates 25 live PWG portraits
final assembled-card schema and synonym-discrimination output still pending
assembled-card and final-card schemas, CI, TEI, OntoLex, and reverse index still required
CITATION.cff, DOI plan, edition_vN cut, and release manifest still required
